title: Configure Distinct Voices Across Agent Profiles
context: The user requested different male voices for SakKing, SakThai, and SakSit, and a female voice for SakSee.
decision: Configure SakKing to use 'en-US-BrianNeural' (male), SakThai to use 'en-US-AndrewNeural' (male), SakSit to use 'en-US-ChristopherNeural' (male), and SakSee to use 'en-US-AriaNeural' (female), all utilizing the 'edge' TTS provider.
consequences: All 4 bots now have unique voices appropriate to their characters, and are configured to use Edge-TTS.
